title: Nina de Korte: Corruption as a Structural Failure
summary: Steward ownership advocate Nina de Korte discusses how Incorruptible frames corporate corruption as structural rather than ethical — connecting the book's thesis about ownership, incentives, and accountability to the growing movement for steward-owned companies.
blockquote: Incorruptible argues that corporate corruption failure is structural rather than ethical — as organizations grow, the systems that govern them quietly reshape behavior.
